description: puma, a brand of German origin, is known for its high-end athletic footwear with simplistic designs. This pair of slippers from puma flaunts the creative expression of Indian talent, Girija Naiksatam, on its footbed as a part of the brand's "Pimp your Sole" Line. Upper Rubber with graphic print and branding Rubber thong straps for a good Fit Fabric toe separator Cushioned footbed for instep comfort Outsole TPR outsole with round suction points for grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
